mission.title: strimzi: Should Cruise Control be reconciled before Entity Operator?
mission.description: Should Cruise Control be reconciled before Entity Operator?. Requested by 5+ users.

steps.title: Check current strimzi deployment
steps.description:
Verify your strimzi version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n strimzi -l app.kubernetes.io/name=strimzi
helm list -n strimzi 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working strimzi installation.

steps.title: Review strimzi configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant strimzi configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n strimzi -l app.kubernetes.io/name=strimzi
kubectl get configmap -n strimzi -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=strimzi
```
For a long time, the reconciliation order in Stirmzi is:
1. (ZooKeeper -> not with us anymore)
2. Kafka
3. Entity Operator
4. Cruise Control
5. Kafka Exporter

Originally, this order did not present any issues.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Should Cruise Control be reconciled before Entity Operator?
steps.description:
Reconcile Cruise Control before Entity Operator to ensure the Topic Operator CC API secret exists when Entity Operator reads it.

**Changes:**

- **`KafkaAssemblyOperator`**: Reorder reconciliation so Cruise Control runs before Entity Operator
- **`CruiseControlReconciler`**: Add `topicOperatorCruiseControlApiSecret()` step to generate the `[cluster]-entity-topic-operator-cc-api` secret before `apiSecret()` reads it
- **`HashLoginServiceApiCredentials`**: Add `generateTopicOperatorApiSecret()`

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n strimzi -l app.kubernetes.io/name=strimzi
kubectl get events -n strimzi --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Should Cruise Control be reconciled before Entity Operator?" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: Reconcile Cruise Control before Entity Operator to ensure the Topic Operator CC API secret exists when Entity Operator reads it.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with strimzi installed or the issue environment reproducible.
